title: The Other Wes Moore (book)
html:
Stub. Wes Moore's memoir/parallel-biography contrasting two boys named Wes Moore from Baltimore — one becomes a Rhodes Scholar, the other a life-sentenced prisoner. Read for UO FHS class winter 2021; subject of Yahir's ecological model final project. Map ladder: Author Wes (military school → Johns Hopkins → Rhodes) vs Other Wes (West Baltimore → drug-dealing → prison) — a first gen / lineage case study.

Connections: 2021 01 12 fhs final · uo · first generation guilt · college admissions · lineage as fate

related.label: FHS final — The Other Wes Moore ecological-model essay (1/12/21)
